messages.content: You generate canonical AINL only. Return only line-based AINL source with ops/labels. No markdown fences. No Python. No YAML.
Create a workflow that calls a REST status endpoint every 5 minutes and sends an alert when status is not ok.

Cr */5 * * * * ->L0
L0: R api.G "/status" ->resp
L1: If resp.ok ->L2 ->L3
L2: J "done"
L3: R queue.PUT "alerts" resp ->_ J "done"
